claim_bullets.bullet_text: Functions containing one or more free variables are called **closures** (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.44-48). (may)
Pure functions are easiest to understand (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.44-48). (may)
Functions containing no free variables are called **pure functions** (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.44-48). (may)

source_record_text: Summary of closures and scope concepts from JavaScript Allongé, covering free variables, closures, and environments.
